assumptions.cost_formula: estimated_kwh = gpu_count * expected_duration_hours * gpu_kwh_assumption * pue; cost_usd = estimated_kwh * electricity_price_per_kwh
assumptions.hard_savings_rule: Hard savings count only valid automatic move_region recommendations with concrete current and recommended energy data.
assumptions.delay_savings_rule: Delay savings are not counted unless future forecast data is provided.

savings_range.note: rough planning range, not billing truth. Validate against actual billing before using it for commitments.

reasons: Uploaded data is strong enough for a focused pilot discussion.

not_counted_savings.reason: Delay savings are not counted because forecast data was not provided.
Demand response revenue is not counted because no utility or market program data was uploaded.
Utility bill reconciliation is not included.
Live cloud inventory is not included.
Capacity is batch-local in this report, not a real reservation system.
Customer contract pricing is not included unless reflected in uploaded energy prices.
Cooling estimates use uploaded PUE or the default PUE assumption.

pilot_recommendation.suggested_success_metric: 15% estimated cost reduction on movable workloads with no SLA impact.
pilot_recommendation.reason: batch has the strongest counted savings among non-critical, non-latency-sensitive movable workloads.
risks_to_watch: Capacity reservation is batch-local, not live inventory.

diagnostic.executive_summary: Based on uploaded data, Blackout found 1 move recommendations and $1.25 in expected estimated savings. This requires validation against actual billing.
diagnostic.workload_flexibility_summary: 60% of valid workloads appear movable. 20% are pinned by workload or residency constraints.

estimated_savings_range.note: rough planning range, not billing truth. Validate against actual billing before using it for commitments.

diagnostic.estimated_carbon_impact: -4,746 g estimated carbon delta based on uploaded region data.

assumptions_used: GPU energy assumption: 0.7 kWh per GPU-hour (default).
Default PUE: 1.2; uploaded region PUE is used when present.
estimated_kwh = gpu_count * expected_duration_hours * gpu_kwh_assumption * pue; cost_usd = estimated_kwh * electricity_price_per_kwh
Delay savings are not counted unless future forecast data is provided.

reasons: Uploaded data is strong enough for a focused pilot discussion.

not_counted_savings.reason: Delay savings are not counted because forecast data was not provided.
Demand response revenue is not counted because no utility or market program data was uploaded.
Utility bill reconciliation is not included.
Live cloud inventory is not included.
Capacity is batch-local in this report, not a real reservation system.
Customer contract pricing is not included unless reflected in uploaded energy prices.
Cooling estimates use uploaded PUE or the default PUE assumption.

recommended_pilot_scope.suggested_success_metric: 15% estimated cost reduction on movable workloads with no SLA impact.
recommended_pilot_scope.reason: batch has the strongest counted savings among non-critical, non-latency-sensitive movable workloads.
risks_to_watch: Capacity reservation is batch-local, not live inventory.

diagnostic.recommended_next_step: Start with batch in us-central-1 for 2 weeks in shadow mode.
